objective: Summarize the current session's main task chain and establish a controlled declaration boundary for future statements.

main_task_summary.result: Established as a Loop/GPCF governance path requiring evidence, validator output, and controlled next-round decisions before claims about search capability, efficiency, or quality improvement.
Converted project-group status into evidence-backed watchlist and authorization boundaries, separating runnable/index evidence from business acceptance claims.

Executed authorized Brain/Studio CodeGraph sync-only closure, including bounded residual sync passes, with final validator output showing Brain pending=0, Studio pending=0, GFIS pending=1, GPCF pending=0 at closure time.
Created controlled evidence, Loop record, and validator; ran document control, pollution, KDS token, Loop document gate, doc_id scan, diff check, and GPCF CodeGraph self-sync.

allowed_declarations: Agent-Reach incorporation has a controlled Loop/GPCF governance path.
Brain/Studio CodeGraph watchlist sync-only closure was executed under explicit authorization.
At the recorded closure time, Brain and Studio CodeGraph pending counts were zero.
GFIS CodeGraph policy exception watch was preserved and not repaired in the authorized closure.
The session generated controlled GPCF evidence, Loop record, and validator artifacts.
No git add, commit, push, deploy, production write, or accepted/integrated/production_ready upgrade was performed in this closure.
forbidden_declarations: Do not claim Agent-Reach is accepted, integrated, or production_ready.
Do not claim project-group search capability, efficiency, or quality is truly improved beyond the verified evidence level.
Do not claim GFIS runtime, real_business_lane, or policy exception has been repaired.
Do not claim Brain/Studio business code changed or business functionality improved from CodeGraph sync-only work.
Do not claim current live CodeGraph pending remains zero without rerunning live status checks.
Do not claim KDS canonical API writeback, external API write, deployment, or production operation occurred.

post_boundary_revalidation_observation.observed_failure: GlobalCloud Brain live pending must be zero
post_boundary_revalidation_observation.interpretation: The earlier sync-only closure remains an evidence-time closure, but current live zero must not be restated without rerunning and passing a fresh live status check.

future_statement_rule: Any later statement that says 'current', 'still zero', 'accepted', 'integrated', 'production_ready', or 'quality improved' must rerun the relevant live validator or status check before being stated as current fact. A post-boundary live revalidation already observed Brain drift, so zero-pending language must be time-qualified.
